title: Trump says when he’s done with Iran, oil prices will drop even lower than they were before
author: Robert Schroeder
fullText: High oil prices can be expected for “a little while,” President Donald Trump said Tuesday, as he predicted a significant fall for crude when the U.S. operation against Iran ends.
summary: High oil prices can be expected for “a little while,” President Donald Trump said Tuesday, as he predicted a significant fall for crude when the U.S. operation against Iran ends.
